name: File Data Reader & Analyzer
description: Fetches a file from a URL, uses Claude AI to extract and transform the data into structured insights, and posts a formatted summary to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's Excel spreadsheet reader workflow.

source.originalName: Read in an Excel spreadsheet file

fileUrl.description: URL of the file to fetch and analyze (CSV, JSON, or text)

analysisGoal.default: Summarize the data, identify key patterns, and highlight notable values
analysisGoal.description: What to analyze or extract from the file data

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the analysis

steps.name: Fetch the file from the provided URL
